description: Universal-core equality predicates — FAILING surface (§55.1). eq("1234") on "9999" → .EqFailed(expected); neq("0000") on "0000" → .NeqFailed(forbidden). isValid false per field, compound rollup false.
rationale: §55.1 eq/neq compare against the predicate arg; §55.9 EqFailed carries the expected value, NeqFailed the forbidden value. Literal args keep this self-contained — the @cell cross-field form is §55.11 / item 4.
